overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long KLAC Daily ETF (KLAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of KLA Corporation (Nasdaq: KLAC) stock, less fees, and expenses. KLAC is a provider of process control and yield management solutions for the semiconductor and electronics industries. KLAG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
